MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:

Syreeta O. Whiteside (415.418.0336) appears In Propria Persona as defendant/claimant

No other appearance is made in this matter.

The CLAIM OF EXEMPTION of Syreeta O. Whiteside is GRANTED. A written order is signed and filed. The clerk shall mail copies to the parties.

MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Hearing On Claim Of Exemption of Defendant Syreeta O. Whiteside is granted and the money held by the Sheriff will be returned to Ms. Whiteside. Ms. Whiteside established that she needs all of her earnings to support herself. Order signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter : Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489 =(302/HK)
